intro: This dashboard is an exception cockpit. Most routine actions are handled by contract. You only need to pay attention to Needs Owner, hard failures, and provider setup problems.

statuses.approved_by_contract: The system decided this was safe and moved forward.
statuses.self_healed: The system found a problem, fixed it safely, and checked it again.
statuses.final_block: The system could not safely fix the problem.
statuses.needs_owner: This is a real owner-level decision.
statuses.fixture_only: This uses faux data and does not prove live results.
statuses.not_configured: An API key or provider setup is missing.
